title: JayPegs Automart - REKT
relevance_summary: Front-end attack exploiting misplaced faith in a developer's code

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys or modifies smart contracts with hardcoded wallet addresses
prevention.trigger: DEPLOY_CONTRACT -> wallet address hardcoded in tx input

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that deploys or modifies smart contracts with hardcoded wallet addresses
summary: A front-end developer mistakenly hardcoded their wallet address into the JayPegs Automart contract, leading to a loss of $3.1 million. A doxxing campaign by Sushi CTO led to the return of most stolen funds.
